personal.name: Sujay Patni
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.tagline:
Hi, I'm Sujay.

I'm a Software Engineer at OfBusiness and a Computer Science graduate from BITS Pilani. I enjoy building scalable backend systems, AI-powered applications, and software that solves real-world problems.

Over the past few years, I've worked on products used by hundreds of thousands of users, built AI-driven automation platforms, designed microservices that support large-scale business operations, and contributed to research published in leading academic venues.

My experience spans Java, Spring Boot, distributed systems, AI agent workflows, search platforms, databases, and system design. What I enjoy most is understanding a problem from first principles and turning it into a solution that is reliable, scalable, and easy to use.

Whether it's building an AI assistant, improving search experiences, designing backend services, or developing custom software solutions, I like working on products that create measurable impact and make people's lives easier.

This portfolio is a collection of the projects, products, research, and engineering challenges I've worked on throughout my journey as a developer.

experience.summary: Building and scaling backend systems for OfBusiness's order operations — from AI-driven support to supplier onboarding — on a platform that moves crores in trade each month.
bullets: Increased customer inquiries handled by 120% by building Ved AI 2.0, an AI support assistant with intent detection that retrieves internal service data and auto-creates Zoho tickets.

Drove a 40% gain in team delivery efficiency by leading adoption of AI-agentic development (Claude Code, Antigravity) — building the supporting infrastructure and training engineers on best practices.
Onboarded 10,000+ suppliers by architecting a Supplier Portal microservice for self-onboarding, verification, and dashboard tracking.
Handled ₹50 Cr+ in monthly stock movement with a Stock Transfer & Invoicing System I helped design, with real-time status tracking and invoice generation.

experience.summary: Owned backend features for ofbusiness.com and the OFB app, a B2B commerce platform serving 500K+ customers.
bullets: Lifted search success rate by 108% and click-through rate by 30% by rebuilding website search with auto-complete, product keyword mapping, and fuzzy matching.
Cut homepage load time by 55% by optimizing API response times and Java memory utilization.
Scaled and maintained backend features for a platform serving 500K+ customers and 10K+ monthly active users.

experience.summary: Worked on the Scheduling for Latency-Sensitive Workloads for Sustainable Computing project at IISc, building energy-efficient CPU scheduling in collaboration with IBM Research.
bullets: Achieved an 80% reduction in energy-delay product versus stock Linux governors by building a power-saving scheduler across heterogeneous CPU cores.
Co-developed the work in collaboration with IBM Research.

experience.summary: Hardened code quality and test coverage for the Invoice API on the NITRO project.
bullets: Resolved 25+ critical SonarQube issues to improve API and overall code quality for the Invoice API.
Built automated JUnit test coverage and migrated a module from Angular v13 to v15.

projects.name: Query System for High-Speed IP Flow Analysis
projects.summary: Built a 3-tier query framework for high-speed network flow storage, cutting query latency by 5%.
projects.description: Engineered a 3-tier framework for query processing on high-speed network flow storage systems for CAIR Lab. Accelerated query performance by 5% by utilizing nProbe to export network flows and analyzing on ClickHouse.

projects.name: Continuous Authentication via PPG Sensors
projects.summary: Built an LSTM-based continuous authentication model on wearable PPG biosignals, reaching 82% accuracy.
projects.description: Devised a Continuous Authentication model using PPG data from wearable biosensors worn by 15 volunteers. Developed an LSTM ANN model to learn individual biometric characteristics and attained 82% accuracy at 0.75 confidence threshold.
projects.publication: Published in Elsevier: Internet of Things (Dec 2024)

education.institution: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani

education.degree: Central Board of Secondary Education (Class XII)

publications.title: Enhancing security through continuous biometric authentication using wearable sensors
